title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, multi-model, admin panel, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API; sync & async, streaming, embeddings.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, delete models via REST.

title: ollama-cli (go-llama)
summary: Interactive Go CLI that wraps Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, prompts library.

title: ollama-copilot.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team; use local models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-codex
summary: Drop-in replacement for OpenAI Codex using Ollama; provides /v1/completions endpoint.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support, PVC, ingress and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready docker-compose stack with Ollama, WebUI, Redis, Postgres, nginx, SSL.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain to chat with your documents.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into your server with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models with conversation threads.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you run local LLM prompts inside your notes and insert results.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake that builds Ollama and common models reproducibly for NixOS and dev shells.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama’s REST API.

title: reddit/r/ollama – Weekly discussion thread
summary: Active Reddit community sharing new models, tools, GPU benchmarks and troubleshooting tips.
